title: Hyderabad Regional Forum: IC3 Student Counseling Event
text: The Regional forum in Hyderabad, held on April 25, 2025, at The Gaudium School in Kollur, Hyderabad, Telangana, India, has been completed. This event was recommended for potential applicants. The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school, rooted in the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future.
summary: The Regional forum in Hyderabad, held on April 25, 2025, at The Gaudium School, was an IC3 event providing counseling and guidance to potential applicants.
